input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ray-head
  namespace: ray
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    app.kubernetes.io/component: head
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
      app.kubernetes.io/component: head
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
        app.kubernetes.io/component: head
        bench.ray.cluster: ray
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: ray-head
          image: rayproject/ray:2.9.0
          command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
          args:
            - >
              ray start --head --port=6379 --dashboard-host=0.0.0.0
              --block
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: gcs
            - containerPort: 8265
              name: dashboard
            - containerPort: 10001
              name: client

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: ray-head
  namespace: ray
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    app.kubernetes.io/component: head
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    app.kubernetes.io/component: head
  ports:
    - name: gcs
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
    - name: dashboard
      port: 8265
      targetPort: 8265
    - name: client
      port: 10001
      targetPort: 10001

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ray-worker
  namespace: ray
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
      app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
        app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
        bench.ray.cluster: ray
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: ray-worker
          image: rayproject/ray:2.9.0
          command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
          args:
            - >
              ray start --address=ray-head:6379
              --block
